top_signals.title: Bloomberg This Weekend | Sen. Lindsey Graham Dead, CENTCOM Launches Strikes on Iran
top_signals.summary:
The news doesn’t stop when markets close. Hosts David Gura, Christina Ruffini and Lisa Mateo bring clarity, context and a bit of humor to the weekend’s biggest headlines, LIVE from New York.

Joined by  Adm. Daryl Caudle, US Dept of War Chief of Naval Operations, Kurt Volker, fmr. US Ambassador to NATO, Rep. Greg Stanton, (D) Arizona, Shannon Kingston, ABC New State Department Reporter, Romina Ruiz-Goiriena, USA Today Executive Editor Investigations, Storytelling, Caleb Silver, Investopedia Editor-in-Chief, Martha Gimbel, The Budget Lab at Yale, Executive Director & Co-Founder, and Erin Lyall, Journalist & Author of “Food Under Fire.” (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Associated British Foods rises to bread battle with Warburtons
top_signals.summary: Associated British Foods is taking on bread giant Warburtons with its Hovis merger. Could this be the biggest thing since sliced bread for the FTSE 100 giant? One of the London Stock Exchange’s biggest stalwarts is ditching the wardrobe and betting on the bread bin.  Associated British Foods (ABF), which has been listed on the [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Michael Saylor posts cryptic Strategy chart after $216 million bitcoin sale: ‘Orange dots tell only part of the story’
top_signals.summary: Strategy holds 843,775 BTC at an average cost of $75,476, leaving the position roughly $9.7 billion underwater with bitcoin trading near $64,000.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
